{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eyes of the Deep
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eyes of the Deep]] record and gather knowledge to contribute to a collective.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eyes of the Deep]] soothe [[Orthos]]' spirit.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eyes of the Deep]] compile and compare memories.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
